title: Feneris Infraction Score (v1)
description: Four-dimension 1-10 scoring rubric applied to every Feneris infraction. Filled independently by Feneris (feneris_assessment) and HIL (hil_assessment). Both records are preserved — never merged or averaged.

scope.description: Breadth of impact. 1=single isolated component. 10=system-wide, all execution paths affected.

severity.description: Governance integrity damage. 1=minor policy drift. 10=core governance law violated.

sensitivity.description: Nature of data or vector involved. 1=non-sensitive operational data. 5-6=credentials/IP/PII. 7-8=bypass vectors/governance keys. 9-10=complete loss of control.

blast_radius.description: Potential propagation if unaddressed. 1=fully self-contained. 5-6=persists across sessions. 9-10=uncontrolled cascade across connected systems.

origin_point.description: Where the anomaly was detected. Format: check:<id>|component:<name>|path:<file-if-applicable>

rationale.description: Why these scores were assigned. Sufficient for a future reviewer to reconstruct the reasoning.
